The sound signature of the Canary Pro elevates your music listening experience by delivering heightened clarity and liveliness. It brings out fine details that may have been previously unnoticed and removes the perceived distance between you and the performance, allowing you to fully immerse yourself in the music. With its expansive headroom, high fidelity, extreme dynamic range, and fast transient responses, the Canary Pro creates an immersive listening experience that is free of fatigue and harshness. In short, the Canary Pro delivers a sensually enriching and highly engaging musical experience. #aaw #advancedacousticwerkes #inearmonitors #customiem #custominears #ciems #ciem #iems #iem #inears #headfi #headphones #earphones #audiophile #earbuds #metalmusic #music #stage #proaudio #audioengineer #musician #singer #vocals #guitar #guitarplayer #drums

We are pleased to present you AAW's latest product Project 4+2, it is our first ever attempt at a collaboration project with a different IEM manufacturer. To top things off, it is a manufacturer you guys are plenty familiar with, Custom Art. Special thanks to Piotr for making all of this possible.

Key Features 
● Dual diaphragm 8mm isobaric woofer 
● 3 precision balanced armature driver 
● Nozzle-less Open Vented Armature (NOVA) Driver 
● 4-way passive + acoustic crossover design 
● FIBAE™ technology flat impedance & phase design 
● Symphonym Tiburon UPOCC copper cable 
 
Limited production number: 500 units
 
AAW and Custom Art teamed up in this unprecedented collaboration to design a never-seen-before hybrid architecture featuring FIBEA technology to bring flat impedance and phasing to an isobaric dynamic driver-based system. Furthermore, 4+2 utilizes advanced Nozzle-less Open Vented Armature (NOVA) Driver coupled with 3 mid-range balanced armature drivers housed in a digitally designed acoustic chamber.
